steps.title: Recognize the linear form
steps.content: The function $f(x) = \frac{4}{11}x$ is linear, written in the form $y = mx + b$ where the slope is the coefficient of $x$, namely $m$.

steps.title: Extract the slope
steps.content:
The coefficient of $x$ in $f(x) = \frac{4}{11}x$ is $\frac{4}{11}$, so the slope is $\frac{4}{11}$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
